prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 23391→24176→24431→26392→28957，呈持续后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 4500 名，2025 年基准约 28957 名，后移速度有所加快；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划 2021–2023 年均为 68 人，2024 年增至 70 人，2025 年增至 72 人；2026 年计划大幅扩招至 89 人，较 2025 年增加 17 人（+23.6%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局产生明显影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北林业大学为 211、双一流高校，软科主榜排名约第 113–115 名，近年排名稳定，属于中游偏上 211 层次；2026 年声誉评价中该校未出现明显负面事件；抖音综合热度排名第 59，评价为「较热」，短视频曝光量处于中等偏上水平，反映报考关注度有所升温；近年无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估数据中该校未进入 A- 及以上等级收录范围，但林业工程、林学等传统优势学科在行业内具有较强影响力，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程 及其自动化等专业在 2026 年持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业高度重合，推升相关专业报考热度；湖北省 2026 年高考总人数约 39.37 万，较 2025 年（约 39.12 万）略有增加，物理类考生按比例估算约 25.1 万，竞争基数扩大；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距湖北省较远，地域偏好对湖北考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年大幅扩招（+23.6%）带来的竞争稀释效应、抖音热度升温及热门工科专业持续高热等正向因素，在 2025 年基准 28957 名基础上，考虑考生总数增加和学校热度小幅回调后，预测最低位次约 32859 名，区间 32359–33359 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 32859 名，区间 32359–33359 名。建议位次在区间下限（32359 名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档计算机/电子信息/电气类热门专业；位次在区间中段（约 32859 名）的考生以二档机械/数学/生物科学类为主力，兼顾一档边缘专业；位次在区间上限（33359 名）附近的考生以三档林学/土木/材料类保底，同时关注二档中位次要求较低的专业。该校 2026 年物理类大幅扩招至 89 人，整体录取机会较往年有所增加。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 23391→24176→24431→26392→28957, showing a continuous downward trend. In the past 3 years, the cumulative decline is about 4500 places, with the 2025 baseline around 28957, and the decline rate has accelerated. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province was 68 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 70 in 2024, and to 72 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 89 students, an increase of 17 students (+23.6%) compared to 2025, with a notable expansion magnitude that significantly impacts the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Forestry University is a 211 and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 113–115 on the Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In 2026, there were no significant negative events in reputation evaluation. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 59, rated as 'relatively hot', with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting increased attention for applications. There have been no recent records of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university did not enter the A- or above grade inclusion range, but its traditional advantageous disciplines such as Forestry Engineering and Forestry have strong influence within the industry, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended in 2026, highly overlapping with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors, boosting application heat for related majors. The total number of Hubei Province college entrance exam takers in 2026 is approximately 393,700, slightly increased from 2025 (about 391,200), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 251,000 by proportion, expanding the competition base. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Hubei Province, and regional preference has a certain inhibitory effect on Hubei candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the competition dilution effect from the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+23.6%), the increase in Douyin popularity, and the sustained high heat of popular engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 28957, and accounting for the increase in total candidates and a slight correction in university heat, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 32859, with a range of 32359–33359.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Electrical (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation)
- Artificial Intelligence/Data Science and Big Data Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Business Administration/Economics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Forestry/Forestry Engineering
- Civil Engineering
- Materials/Chemistry
- Light Chemical Engineering/Forest Chemical Engineering/Wood Science and Engineering
- Veterinary Medicine/Animal Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 32859, range 32359–33359. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (32359) are advised to focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors in Computer/Electronic Information/Electrical. Candidates with rankings around the middle (approximately 32859) should primarily target Tier 2 majors in Mechanical/Mathematics/Biological Sciences, while also considering marginal Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (33359) should use Tier 3 majors in Forestry/Civil Engineering/Materials as safety options, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. The university's significant expansion of Physics Category enrollment to 89 students in 2026 increases overall admission opportunities compared to previous years.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 4525→4979→4876→5059→5213, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 688 places over the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 5213. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province was 16 students in 2021, 14 students each year from 2022 to 2024, and rebounded to 16 students in 2025. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 14 students, a decrease of 2 students (-12.5%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant reduction and increased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 113–115 on the Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years. There are no significant negative events affecting its reputation in 2026. On Douyin, its popularity is 'relatively hot' (ranked 59th overall), with medium-to-high short video exposure. There have been no records of enrollment gaps in recent years, so the application psychology is relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university did not enter the A- or above range. The History Category majors are mainly in literature, law, economics, and management, lacking top-tier discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is relatively hot but with clear differentiation, Business Administration categories are differentiated and wait-and-see, Foreign Language majors are generally wait-and-see, and overall liberal arts major popularity is differentiated. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Hubei Province is about 142,500, a slight increase from 2025 (141,400). The university is located in Harbin, far from Hubei, and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Hubei liberal arts examinees to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the historical ranking fluctuation and backward trend, the 2026 enrollment reduction (-12.5%) intensifying competition, and the differentiation of liberal arts major popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 5213, and after minor adjustments for the slight increase in total examinees and university popularity, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4852, with a range of 4352–5352.

It is recommended that examinees with rankings within the lower limit of the range (4352) can aim for Tier 1 Law and Business Administration; those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 4852) should focus on Tier 2 Political Science/Marxist Theory/Landscape Architecture; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range (5352) should use Tier 3 Foreign Languages/Social Work as safety options. The university's History Category enrollment in 2026 is reduced to 14 students, a small number, so applicants need to pay attention to ranking matching.
